estimate_method: At stretch lambda=2, fit the reported 100% nominal tensile modulus to incompressible neo-Hookean P=mu*(lambda-lambda^-2), then use small-strain E=3*mu. Poisson ratio and damping are uncalibrated engineering starting assumptions.
notes: Uncalibrated starting profile; not physical force ground truth. Fit against press-hold-release load-cell data from the manufactured fingertip before quantitative use.
